summary: #73724 is the canonical repair target for this automerge cluster, but it is not merge-ready. The hydrated PR is open, same-repo branch-writable, dirty/unmergeable, has relevant failing checks from the previous run, and lacks merge preflight proof. Plan an in-place contributor-branch repair; no close or merge actions are allowed by this job.
